name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BC125: New MiuMiu MiuWander Bag, made with imported lambskin featuring the brand's iconic Matelasse texture embroidery, retro matte hardware, utilizing curved lines to retain a playful feel, the bag shape is structured and stylish, full of personality, sweet and chic, spacious, almost every fashion blogger has one, multiple colors available: Black, Milky White, Peacock Blue, Sunlight Yellow, Cherry Blossom Pink, Big Red, Dimensions: 23X13X7, comes with original packaging
